input.question: I teach a multigrade classroom with Class 3 and Class 5 students together in a single room in a government primary school. While I teach one group, the other group gets distracted and noisy. How do I keep both groups meaningfully engaged?
input.subject: Classroom Management

input.question: Many of my Class 7 students freeze during mental maths and say 'maths is not for me'. Their parents cannot help at home. What evidence-based strategies can I use to reduce maths anxiety and build confidence?
input.subject: Mathematics Pedagogy

input.question: My school is moving from rote-based unit tests to competency-based assessment as per NEP 2020 and the NCF. I have only ever set recall-type question papers. How do I start designing questions that test application and higher-order thinking?
input.subject: Assessment
